body.query: Who voices the character in Spongebob Squarepants who is named after a glowing species found in some beaches in Portugal?

json.query: Who voices the character in Spongebob Squarepants who is named after a glowing species found in some beaches in Portugal?

message.content:
The character in SpongeBob SquarePants named after a glowing species found on some Portuguese beaches is Plankton, voiced by actor Doug Lawrence (also known as Mr. Lawrence). Plankton is the owner of the Chum Bucket restaurant and is constantly scheming to steal the Krabby Patty secret formula from his rival, Mr. Krabs.

The glowing species that inspired Plankton's name is likely the bioluminescent plankton found in certain coastal areas, including some beaches in Portugal. These microscopic organisms emit light when disturbed, creating a beautiful blue glow in the water at night. This phenomenon, known as bioluminescence, occurs when the plankton are agitated by waves or movement.

Doug Lawrence has been voicing Plankton since the character's introduction in the show's pilot episode in 1999. He has also provided voices for other characters in the series, including Larry the Lobster and various incidental characters. Lawrence's portrayal of Plankton has become iconic, with the character's high-pitched voice and maniacal laugh being instantly recognizable to fans of the show.

The connection between Plankton's name and bioluminescent marine life adds an interesting layer to the character's design and personality. It's fitting that a character so small yet ambitious would be named after tiny organisms that can create such a striking visual impact on beaches around the world.

json.query:
MATCH (n)
WHERE ((n.name IN $entity_names
      OR ANY(ename IN $entity_names WHERE toLower(n.name) CONTAINS toLower(ename))
      OR ANY(ename IN $entity_names WHERE toLower(ename) CONTAINS toLower(n.name)))
      OR toLower(n.name) IN [x IN $entity_names | toLower(x)]
      OR ANY(ename IN $entity_names WHERE size(ename) > 3 AND toLower(n.name) CONTAINS toLower(ename)))
  AND (n.tenant_id = $tenant_id OR n.tenant_id IS NULL)
WITH n,
     CASE
       WHEN n:Organization THEN 1.3
       WHEN n:Person THEN 1.2
       WHEN n:City THEN 1.1
       WHEN n:Museum THEN 1.2
       WHEN n:Technology THEN 1.0
       WHEN n:Disease THEN 1.0
       ELSE 0.9
     END as entity_priority
ORDER BY entity_priority DESC
LIMIT 10

OPTIONAL MATCH path = (n)-[r*1..3]-(m)
WHERE (m.tenant_id = $tenant_id OR m.tenant_id IS NULL)
WITH path, n as startNode, entity_priority,
     reduce(score = entity_priority, rel IN relationships(path) |
       score + CASE type(rel)
         WHEN 'A_CREE' THEN 1.5
         WHEN 'CAUSE_PAR' THEN 1.4
         WHEN 'CONNECTE' THEN 1.3
         WHEN 'PROTEGE_CONTRE' THEN 1.3
         WHEN 'ETUDIE' THEN 1.2
         WHEN 'UTILISE' THEN 1.2
         WHEN 'CIBLE' THEN 1.2
         WHEN 'EXPOSE_A' THEN 1.1
         WHEN 'VISE_A_LIMITER' THEN 1.1
         WHEN 'SOUS_ENSEMBLE_DE' THEN 1.0
         WHEN 'ETEND' THEN 1.0
         ELSE 0.8
       END
     ) as path_score,
     length(path) as path_length

WHERE path_score > (path_length * 0.3)

RETURN
  startNode.name as start_entity,
  [node IN nodes(path) | {name: node.name, type: labels(node)[0]}] as path_nodes,
  [rel IN relationships(path) | type(rel)] as path_relations,
  path_score,
  path_length
ORDER BY path_score DESC
LIMIT $max_results

error.description:
Failed query: SELECT summary, relevance_score, entity_names 
FROM community_summaries 
WHERE entity_names && ARRAY[]::text[]
  AND tenant_id = ''
ORDER BY relevance_score DESC 
LIMIT 5
error.name: NodeOperationError

parameters.query:
=SELECT summary, relevance_score, entity_names 
FROM community_summaries 
WHERE entity_names && ARRAY[{{ $('Neo4j Query Builder (Deep Traversal V2)').json.entities.map(e => "'" + e.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::text[]
  AND tenant_id = '{{ $('OTEL Init').json.user_context.tenant_id }}'
ORDER BY relevance_score DESC 
LIMIT 5
